summary: Cooper City Modular BMC Support _WW51.4.pptx outlines partially supported BMC features by L-BMC.
Proposed modular BMC support relates to existing BMC features by providing methods for validation teams to access BMC SMBus segments and PECI.
Commit 1b3f8aefd3f1b01a36094f81259294c0795b712f and merge request 97 addressed a failed Close Session command during MIV recovery.
Code review issue forwarded to Dave/Curtis for investigation
Updated L-BMC firmware provides method for validation team to access SMBus segments and PECI
evidence: According to the RAW LOGS, the updated L-BMC firmware provides a method(s) for validation team to access BMC SMBus segments and PECI.
IVL crash dump issue addressed on July 28, 2020
